upload.title: Upload Skill
upload.subtitle: Share your AI Agent Skill with the community. All uploads are automatically scanned by GoPlus AgentGuard.
upload.clickToUpload: Click to upload or drag and drop
upload.invalidGithubUrl: Please enter a valid GitHub repository URL
upload.customNameHint: Leave empty to use repository name
upload.customNameDetail: If empty, the skill name will be extracted from the repository or SKILL.md
upload.customDescHint: Leave empty to use description from SKILL.md or README
upload.customDescDetail: If empty, the description will be extracted from SKILL.md frontmatter or README content

requestDetail.title: Incentive Layer Proposal
requestDetail.subtitle: A community member wants to build a sustainable incentive layer for your open-source project
requestDetail.step1: A Skill Token is created on BNB Chain, linked to your project
requestDetail.step2: Every trade generates tax fees that flow to a treasury
requestDetail.step3: As the verified author, you can claim these fees anytime
requestDetail.step4: More community engagement = more trading = more revenue for you
requestDetail.flywheelNote: This is not a one-time event — it's a continuous incentive flywheel that rewards open-source builders for their contributions.
requestDetail.accountMismatch: Your GitHub account ({{username}}) does not match the skill author ({{authorName}}). Only the skill author can approve this request.
requestDetail.authorVerificationDesc: If you are the author, after logging in, go to the [Incentive Proposal] page to handle the proposals you receive. Once approved, a Skill Token will be created that generates ongoing revenue for you through trading fees.
requestDetail.approvedMsg: Proposal approved! The incentive layer can now be activated.
requestDetail.approveConfirm: Are you sure you want to approve this proposal? This action cannot be undone.
requestDetail.rejectConfirm: Are you sure you want to reject this proposal? This action cannot be undone.
requestDetail.proposalApprovedDesc: The incentive layer is ready to be activated. Trading fees will flow to you as the project author.

revenue.title: Claim Revenue
revenue.noVerifiedSkills: You don't have any verified skills yet.
revenue.overdueDesc: Arrival timed out, possibly due to chain congestion.
revenue.infoBar: GitHub-sourced skills auto-credited | 1 claim per token per day | Min 0.1 BNB to claim | ZIP skills must go through
revenue.ruleArrivalDesc: After a successful claim, funds are expected to arrive within 24 hours. Actual time depends on on-chain confirmation speed.
revenue.ruleGasDesc: Actual amount received = pending amount − Gas fee. Gas is deducted automatically at the time of on-chain transfer.
revenue.ruleIrreversibleDesc: Once a claim request is submitted, it is sent on-chain and cannot be cancelled or reversed.
revenue.ruleAccumulateDesc: Unclaimed revenue keeps accumulating. There is no expiration; you can claim at any time.
revenue.ruleDisputeDesc: ZIP skill dispute applications are typically reviewed within 1–3 business days. You will be notified of the result.
revenue.ruleTaxDesc: The platform does not withhold any taxes. Users are responsible for reporting and paying taxes according to local regulations.

dispute.title: Discover & Claim
dispute.bindGithubDesc: Bind your GitHub account to claim your open-source projects
dispute.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why you are the author of this skill...
dispute.bindRequiredDesc: Please bind your GitHub account and wallet address above before submitting a claim.
